mapper.select: /** UsptProgrmDao.selectList */ select progrm_id , member_id , progrm_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PROGRM_TYPE', progrm_type_cd) as progrm_type , progrm_type_input , grad_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('GRAD_TYPE', grad_type_cd) as grad_type , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt , row_number() over (order by created_dt) as rn from uspt_progrm where member_id = #{memberId}
